explanation: This command mimics the obfuscated PowerShell behavior described in the Sigma rule by using string insertion and COM object manipulation to install an MSI via Windows Installer. It uses the same evasion techniques like string insertion and suppressed UI.
This command is a variation of the first, using double quotes for string concatenation and escaping to obfuscate the command further while maintaining the same behavior.
This command uses an alternative method to instantiate the COM object using [activator]::CreateInstance, which is functionally equivalent to New-Object but adds another layer of obfuscation.
